Runway Review (2026): Pricing, Features & Alternatives

Professional-grade AI video generation and editing suite.

MakerRunway AI
CategoryAI Video Generators, AI Image Generators
PricingFree plan available (limited credits); paid plans from $12/mo
Free tierYes
WebsiteVisit Runway →

Best for

Creators and studios needing professional AI video generation.

Pros

  • Industry-leading text-to-video quality
  • Advanced editing tools like green screen and motion tracking
  • Used by professional film and ad studios

Cons

  • Free credits are limited and video generation is compute-heavy
  • Steeper learning curve for beginners

Alternatives to Runway

Midjourney

One of the most popular AI image generators, known for highly artistic, polished output.

DALL-E

OpenAI's image generator, built directly into ChatGPT.

Leonardo AI

AI image generation platform popular with game artists and designers.

CapCut

Free AI-powered video editor popular for short-form social content.
